title: Cached accounting desync with a fee-on-transfer asset

source.inspired_by: Vaults that cache totals from requested amounts and mishandle fee-on-transfer / rebasing tokens, breaking the assets==accounting invariant

ground_truth.description: cachedTotal is incremented by the requested deposit amount rather than the measured balance delta. With a fee-on-transfer token the vault receives less than requested, so the cache overstates real assets; early withdrawers are paid in full and the final withdrawer's transfer reverts for lack of funds (bricked).
